chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4959 - وَ رَوَى بَكْرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ اَلْأَزْدِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّ أَمِيرَ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "إِنَّ صَاحِبَ اَلشَّكِّ وَ اَلْمَعْصِيَةِ فِي اَلنَّارِ لَيْسَا مِنَّا وَ لاَ إِلَيْنَا ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4959 - Bakr ibn Muhammad al-Azdi narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) that Commander of the Faithful (as) said:
"Indeed, the one who harbors doubt and persists in disobedience is in the Fire; they are neither from us nor connected to us."
